package.name: dg_kilo
package.description:
DG-KILO: Kinematic-Inertial-LiDAR Odometry with Degradation Optimization and Ground Constraints for the Unitree Go2W wheeled-legged quadruped.
Implements Xu et al., "DG-KILO: A Kinematic-Inertial-LiDAR Odometry Based on Degradation Optimization and Ground Constraints," IEEE T-IM 2026.
Key features: IESKF LIO with Hessian-based degradation detection, intensity-feature gating, adaptive scan slicing driven by leg odometry, leg ESKF with rolling-wheel contact model, ground height + coplanar constraints, and GTSAM iSAM2 factor graph fusing all modalities.
